name: webex
description: Send messages and look up rooms and people in Webex

envVars.name: WEBEX_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Webex Integration Client ID (from your integration in My Apps)

tools.name: List Rooms
tools.description: List Webex rooms (spaces) the authenticated user belongs to

sortBy.description: Sort order: id, lastactivity, or created

historicalSummary.omitted: room metadata and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: List Messages
tools.description: List recent messages in a Webex room

roomId.description: Room ID to list messages from

before.description: Only return messages sent before this ISO 8601 timestamp

tools.name: Send Message
tools.description: Send a message to a Webex room or directly to a person

roomId.description: Room ID to post the message to (omit when using toPersonEmail)

toPersonEmail.description: Email address of a person to message directly (omit when using roomId)

markdown.description: Markdown message body (takes precedence over text)

tools.name: Get My Details
tools.description: Get the authenticated Webex user's profile

tools.name: List People
tools.description: Look up people in the organization by email or display name

email.description: Exact email address to look up

displayName.description: Display name prefix to search for

prompts.title: Catch up on a room
prompts.prompt: List the most recent messages in one of my Webex rooms and summarize the discussion.

prompts.title: Send a message
prompts.prompt: Send a Webex message to a room or a person.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Webex Integration Setup

steps.title: Create a Webex integration
steps.description: Sign in at https://developer.webex.com/ (a free Webex account works) and go to My Apps → Create a New App → Create an Integration.

steps.title: Set the redirect URI and scopes
steps.description: Set the Redirect URI to your app URL ending in /api/auth/webex/callback and select the scopes spark:messages_read, spark:messages_write, spark:rooms_read, and spark:people_read.

steps.title: Copy credentials
steps.description: Copy the integration's Client ID and Client Secret into WEBEX_CLIENT_ID and WEBEX_CLIENT_SECRET (the secret is shown only once).

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Connect your Webex account and run the Get My Details tool.

notes: The token endpoint takes client_id and client_secret in the POST body
Access tokens last 14 days; refresh tokens last 90 days and their lifetime renews on each refresh
Webex automatically adds the spark:kms scope so the integration can read encrypted message content
